name: Plunder Patrollship Brann
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海造賊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プランドロール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>豪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>速</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のブレンネ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>号</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
All other Fiend monsters you control gain 500 ATK. You can discard 1 "Plunder Patroll" card, then target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; banish it, then you can add 1 "Plunder Patroll" monster from your Deck to your hand. This is a Quick Effect if this card is equipped with a "Plunder Patroll" card. You can only use this effect of "Plunder Patrollship Brann" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Applies effect while equipped with an Equip Card
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
